# Extra training deps installed on top of the NGC PyTorch container (env/setup_env.sh).
# torch + CUDA come from the container image — do NOT pin torch here (avoids a mismatch).
#
# Resolved on the cluster 2026-07-15: transformers 5.13.1, trl 1.8.0, peft 0.19.1,
# bitsandbytes 0.49.2. g1_smoke.py is written against those major versions (TRL renamed
# max_seq_length -> max_length and takes processing_class; transformers renamed
# torch_dtype -> dtype). If you re-pin these, re-check that call.
# The G1 gate uses the transparent transformers+peft+trl+bitsandbytes stack; unsloth is
# the faster option for the real QLoRA runs (Ch. 05) — uncomment when moving past G1.

transformers>=4.46
peft>=0.13
trl>=0.12
datasets>=3.0
accelerate>=1.0
bitsandbytes>=0.44
huggingface_hub>=0.26
sentencepiece
gguf>=0.10            # required by llama.cpp convert_lora_to_gguf.py
# unsloth            # faster QLoRA for the real runs; pin torch/transformers to its matrix
